message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC
skinparam noteBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantPadding 5
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam arrowColor #000000
skinparam arrowThickness 1
skinparam messageFontColor #000000
skinparam messageFontSize 12
skinparam messageFontStyle plain
skinparam messageFontName Arial
skinparam messageTextAlign left
skinparam messageTextPadding 5
skinparam messageTextMargin 5
skinparam messageTextIndent 0
skinparam messageTextWrap true
skinparam messageTextMaxWidth 300
skinparam messageTextMinWidth 100
skinparam messageTextLineHeight 1.2
skinparam messageTextSpacing 0.5
skinparam messageTextLeading 1.2
skinparam messageTextTrailing 0.5
skinparam messageTextIndent 0
skinparam messageTextAlign left
skinparam messageTextPadding 5
skinparam messageTextMargin 5
skinparam messageTextWrap true
skinparam messageTextMaxWidth 300
skinparam messageTextMinWidth 100
skinparam messageTextLineHeight 1.2
skinparam messageTextSpacing 0.5
skinparam messageTextLeading 1.2
skinparam messageTextTrailing 0.5

participant "Resident" as Resident
participant "WeResident" as WeResident
participant "WeID" as WeID
participant "WebService" as WeService

== Provider Login Into Provider App ==

Resident -> WeResident: Send username:password /login
alt [Provider already exist]
    WeResident -> WeID: Get Token by username:password /oauth/authorize
    WeID --> WeResident: Return Token to WeResident
    WeResident --> Resident: Return {"token": "jwt-token"}
end

== Provider Query/Search Service ==

Resident -> WeService: Query services including token\n/weservices/services\nHeader\nAuthorization: Bear {jwt-token}
note right of Resident
Query Service schema
{"query":"string","status":12}
end note

alt [above token is valid]
    WeService -> WeID: verify token
    WeID --> WeService: 200
    WeService --> Resident: Response services data
    note right of Resident
Service Data Array schema
[{"id":"string","company":"string","name":"string","rate":4.2,"image":"image.png"},{}],
{"total":10,"currentPage":1,"perPage":5}
    end note
else [Token is expired/invalid]
    WeService -> WeID: verify token
    WeID --> WeService: 400
    WeService --> Resident: Response 401 status
end

== Create Order(Request) ==

Resident -> WeService: Create Service\nPOST: /weservices/service/{serviceID}/order
note right of Resident
Order Request schema
{"resident":"$userID",
"service":"$serviceID",
"pricingModel":{},
"noteDetail":"string",
"address":"string",
"schedule":Time}
end note

WeService -> WeID: verify token
WeID --> WeService: 200
WeService --> Resident: Response Service Data(JSON)

Resident -> WeService: Comment(chat) in Order\nPOST: /weservices/order/{orderID}/comment
note right of Resident
Comment Data
{"content":"string"}
end note

WeService -> WeID: verify token
WeID --> WeService: 200
WeService --> Resident: 200

@enduml
